strict_win_deltas.delta: P1 adds a coherent --format json branch inside the existing 'version' case that reuses readPackageVersion() and JSON.stringify, while P2's diff is empty and implements no design at all.
P1 explicitly checks format !== 'json' and calls process.exit(1) with an error message for unsupported/missing formats, whereas P2 contains no code changes and thus no error handling whatsoever.

P1 satisfies every stated requirement (JSON single-line output, bare version preserved, exit 1 on bad format, new test added, only bin/cli.js and tests/cli.test.js touched) while P2's empty diff satisfies none of them.

P1 updates the USAGE string to document 'version [--format json]' and adds two clear, readable tests, giving future maintainers discoverable docs and coverage, whereas P2 leaves the CLI and tests completely unchanged.
